overview: Andhra University College of Engineering (AUCE) Self-Finance, located in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, is a self-supporting division of the prestigious Andhra University College of Engineering established under Andhra University. The self-financed programs operate within the main AU campus ecosystem and provide students access to centralized placements, university infrastructure, experienced faculty, research facilities, and industry-oriented technical education in emerging engineering disciplines.
accreditation: Andhra University is NAAC A++ Accredited and recognized by UGC. AU College of Engineering is AICTE Approved and functions under Andhra University autonomous regulations.

nirfRanking.university: Andhra University ranked among leading public universities in India

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹62,000 per year (AP EAPCET Convener Quota Approx.)

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹62,000 – ₹85,000 per year depending on admission category

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence)
B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science)
B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering
B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering

placements.internationalOffers: Limited international opportunities through multinational recruiters

admissions.admissionProcess: UG admissions are primarily conducted through AP EAPCET counseling administered by APSCHE. Lateral entry admissions are through AP ECET. PG admissions are based on GATE/AP PGECET scores.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions generally follow APSCHE counseling schedules released annually between May and August.

campus.specialNote: Self-finance students share the same placement ecosystem, faculty resources, laboratories, and university infrastructure as regular AU engineering students.

hostelAndScholarships.hostelFee: ₹45,000 – ₹80,000 per year depending on hostel type

contact.phone: Refer official university contact details for specific department inquiries
contact.address: Andhra University College of Engineering, Junction, AU North Campus, Andhra University North Campus, Andhra University, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530003, India
